CustomMetadata.label: UA-005 - Inactive users with active CRM

values.value: Inactive users with active CRM licenses

Active standard users have not logged in for more than 90 days or have never logged in. These dormant accounts represent an attack surface that is difficult to monitor through login anomaly detection.
Dormant accounts with valid credentials cannot be detected by login anomaly alerts. A compromised dormant account may go unnoticed for months.
Deactivate all users who have not logged in within 90 days. Run a quarterly access review. Automate deactivation via Identity Provider lifecycle management if available.
